<mxCell id="C_VDdMSmtDSksHA0enAh-33" value="Isolation &amp; Access<br>• Separate subs/RGs, VNets, identities, keys, storage, logging<br>• RBAC ; vendor access time‑bound &amp; audited<div>• Azure as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_VDdMSmtDSksHA0enAh-34" value="Data Handling
• PROD = authoritative + immutable audit trails
• Lower envs: masked/synthetic; PII only if explicitly authorized" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=#999999;fillColor=#fffff0;" parent="C_VDdMSmtDSksHA0enAh-37" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="389" y="703" width="430" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_VDdMSmtDSksHA0enAh-35" value="Parity & Releases

• RBAC ; vendor access time‑bound & audited

• Lower envs: masked/synthetic; PII only if explicitly authorized
